name: Any legal filing or signed document (Jed only)
description: INBiz filings, IRS forms, signed contracts, trademark applications, registered agent changes. Always Jed.
trigger_examples: submit the trademark for Building Shultz
change the registered agent on the LLC
sign and submit the contractor agreement
prompt_template: Tell Jed: 'Legal filing — this is yours. Here's what I see you want: {{intent_summary}}. I can prep paperwork or walk you through the form, but the actual submission is your signature.'
notes: EIN application itself takes 5 min — irs.gov/ein. Jed completes it.
